content.en:
"Migu Dao Ancestor, Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, Tianfan Dao Ancestor, what do you think?"

Eternal Dao Ancestor Chuan Yin asked.

"Eternal Dao Ancestor, if we give up, we won't wade into this troubled water!"

Zhenyu Daozu hurriedly said.

Migu Dao Ancestor and Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor also coaxed, and they gave up one after another, not daring to join forces with the Eternal Dao Ancestor, they were really afraid of the Golden Crow Palace Lord.

It's really that the Golden Crow Palace Lord is too powerful, and his reputation at the beginning is too loud.

Although the Qinglong Palace Lord is very powerful, in fact, the Qinglong Palace Lord does not have many strong records, but the Golden Crow Palace Lord is different, the Golden Crow Palace Lord once fought against the five half-step domain ancestors in the Divine Heaven Realm alone, and killed three half-step domain ancestors, and his reputation is far from being comparable to the Qinglong Palace Lord.

According to legend, when the Golden Crow Palace Lord was in the Domain Realm Shattering Battle, he fought with an enemy half-step Domain Ancestor who used the Body Realm of All Things and was killed by the other party.

But now it seems that this news is fake, and the true strength of the Golden Crow Palace Lord is probably not weaker than that of the half-step domain ancestor who has the physical body realm of all things.

Therefore, Migu Dao Ancestor, Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, and Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor did not dare to be enemies of the Golden Crow Palace Lord at all.

"The Dao Ancestors of the Town Domain are unwilling to cooperate, we can only rely on ourselves!"

The Eternal Dao Ancestor transmitted the sound to the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, Gengjin Dao Ancestor, Dao.

"The corpse of this forbidden creature is too valuable, and there is an Eternal Source Stone statue inside, so it must be fought for!" said the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor.

Rumble!

Eternal Dao Ancestor, Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, and Gengjin Dao Ancestor were holding forbidden weapons, and they were all breathing, obviously unwilling to give in.

"Very well, you look like you're looking for death!"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord sneered.

Just as he was about to make a move to kill the Eternal Dao Ancestors and them, two figures appeared, standing beside the Eternal Dao Ancestors, and these two people were two half-step domain ancestors.

"Hengguang Dao Ancestor, Linghe Dao Ancestor, you are here!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor said in a low voice.

"Well, if we don't come, the three of you won't be able to stop the Golden Crow Palace Master!" said Linghe Dao Ancestor with a smile.

Seeing that there were two more half-step domain ancestors in Black Wind Mountain, the Golden Crow Palace Lord still didn't pay attention to it, and said with a smile: "Three half-step domain ancestors, five half-step domain ancestors, there is no difference to me, if it's just that, then you are still dead!"

Wow!

The Golden Crow Palace Lord killed the past, and the other half-step domain ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace did not make a move, obviously having full confidence in the Golden Crow Palace Lord.

"Let's get on it!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor said in a low voice.

Thundered!!!!

In the Dark Forbidden Void, six half-step Domain Ancestors fought.

I saw that the Golden Crow Palace Master was fighting the five half-step domain ancestors alone, but he did not fall into the disadvantage at all, but completely suppressed the five half-step domain ancestors.

Abrupt.

The terrifying physical coercion erupted from the Golden Crow Palace Lord's body, and with a sword of the Golden Crow Sword in his hand, the Eternal Dao Ancestor was shocked into the air, and the terrifying power directly hit the Eternal Dao Ancestor's body and soul shock.

Rumble!

The Golden Crow Palace Lord showed a supreme posture, and every blow injured the five half-step domain ancestors, but the five half-step domain ancestors could not hurt the Golden Crow Palace Lord, it was really the Golden Crow Palace Master's body was too terrifying, and it had a forbidden supreme source, he could constantly repair his injuries, even if he was injured a little, he could recover quickly.

Among the five half-step domain ancestors, only the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor had condensed the Supreme Dao Source, but their recovery speed was not comparable to the speed of injury.

"All things in the flesh realm, you have really reached the realm of all things in the flesh body!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor was shocked.

"That's right!" the Golden Crow Palace Lord laughed: "When the Domain Realm was shattered in the first battle, I would have stepped into the realm of the flesh of all things, otherwise I would have died in that battle a long time ago." It's a pity that I only entered the realm of all things in my physical body, but I didn't enter the realm of all things in the forbidden way, otherwise if my Dao and my physical body entered the realm of all things, I would have stepped into the second step of the half-step domain ancestor at this moment, and I belong to the real half-step domain ancestor of the realm of all things!"

The Eternal Dao Ancestor is very dignified, if the Golden Crow Palace Lord's Forbidden Dao also enters the realm of all things, then there is no need to fight, the Golden Crow Palace Lord can easily kill them, the half-step Domain Ancestors who are in the first step.

Strictly speaking, there are only three steps at the half-step domain ancestor level.

The first step was that these half-step domain ancestors, the forbidden path and the physical body had not all entered the realm of all things.

The second step is that the forbidden path and the physical body have both stepped into the realm of all things, which can be called the half-step domain ancestor of the realm of all things.

As for the third step, it is the perfection of the realm of all things, the physical body is comparable to the physical body of the three-step domain ancestor, and the forbidden dao also has the three-percent power of the domain ancestor, at this time, the combination of the physical body and the forbidden dao can form the realm of all things, and it is easy to suppress the half-step domain ancestor of the first and second steps, and then impact forward is the real domain ancestor.

But in fact, the half-step Domain Ancestor who stepped into the second step almost did not appear, and would retreat until the third step, and then go to the Domain Ancestor level, and the battle in the outside world had almost nothing to do with them.

Therefore, at the beginning, it was almost impossible to see the second-step half-step domain ancestor in the Divine Heaven Realm, let alone see the third-step half-step domain ancestor.

A half-step domain ancestor like the Golden Crow Palace Lord who has entered the realm of all things in the flesh is already the top existence among the half-step domain ancestors, far from being comparable to ordinary half-step domain ancestors.

Distance.

Ye Tian, Ouyang Jiu'er and others were watching the battle, and they were extremely shocked when they saw the Golden Crow Palace Master beating the five half-step domain ancestors alone.

"The Golden Crow Palace Lord is inevitably too powerful, much stronger than the Blue Dragon Palace Lord!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this time, he was a little worried about the Eternal Dao Ancestor and them, once the Eternal Dao Ancestor and them fell, something big would happen.

"Don't worry!"

Ouyang Jiu'er's voice came: "You Black Wind Mountain have the courage to provoke the Golden Crow Palace Master, so naturally you are not afraid of the Golden Crow Palace Master!"

Ye Tian looked at Ouyang Jiu'er, only to see Ouyang Jiu'er continue: "If I hadn't guessed wrong, your Black Wind Mountain would probably have sent a half-step domain ancestor who was not weaker than the Golden Crow Palace Lord, maybe you would do it soon!"

As soon as the words fell, the battle in the distance changed.

I saw that the Golden Crow Palace Lord kept retreating and withdrew from the battle.

And on the body of the Golden Crow Palace Lord, a small wound emerged, someone had shot at him just now, and a blow broke his defenses.

"Who?"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord condensed.

Wow!

The void rippled, and a woman came out of it.

"Black Wind Mountain, Miaofa Dao Ancestor!"

The woman said lightly.

"Your Tao has entered the realm of all things, but your physical body has not entered the realm of all things!"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord saw it at a glance, and he was immediately extremely jealous.

It is more difficult for the Tao to enter the realm of all things than for the physical body to enter the realm of all things, because the Tao must rely on oneself to comprehend the realm of all things, but the physical body can completely use certain treasures to enter the realm of all things, and the stars and sands of all things must be one of them.

If there is enough Ten Thousand Things Star Sand, this Mystic Law Dao Ancestor can elevate his physical body to the Ten Thousand Things Realm, which is equivalent to directly stepping into the second step of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and his strength completely crushes the other Half-Step Domain Ancestors.

At that time, the Miao Fa Dao Ancestor couldn't kill an ordinary half-step domain ancestor without a few moves.
